changes: SKILL.md patched with CRITICAL NEVER callout for static \Drupal:: in controllers (12-01)
Both variants now load coding-standards skill as baseline (12-03)
Browser step dropped from eval pipeline (zero discriminatory value)

failed_expectations: Route parameter {user} typed as int instead of UserInterface -- entity upcasting requires entity class type hint
API endpoint /api/user/1/activity returns HTTP 500 -- JsonResponse::getCacheableMetadata() does not exist
phpcs warnings: \Drupal::service() static call in without-skill variant (exits non-zero but 0 errors found -- grader counted exit code 1 as failure)

notes: Massive improvement. SKILL.md patch eliminated static \Drupal:: usage in WITH variant (was the failure in v2). Coding-standards baseline fixed phpcs brace style error that plagued WITH variant. WITHOUT variant now fails on entity upcasting type hints, broken API endpoint, and minor phpcs issues -- all patterns the domain skill teaches correctly.
